item.title: Unlim Cloud [File Management]
item.itunes:title: Unlim Cloud [File Management]
item.itunes:author: inulute
item.itunes:summary:
Unlim Cloud
(File Management)
UnlimCloud Desktop app is a unofficial application that provides unlimited cloud storage for your files, utilizing Telegram as the storage solution. The app is built using Tauri and is available on GitHub. With UnlimCloud, you can log in using your Telegram ID and start storing your files without worrying about storage limits.

[read more]
item.description:
Unlim Cloud
(File Management)
UnlimCloud Desktop app is a unofficial application that provides unlimited cloud storage for your files, utilizing Telegram as the storage solution. The app is built using Tauri and is available on GitHub. With UnlimCloud, you can log in using your Telegram ID and start storing your files without worrying about storage limits.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Unlim Cloud
(File Management)
UnlimCloud Desktop app is a unofficial application that provides unlimited cloud storage for your files, utilizing Telegram as the storage solution. The app is built using Tauri and is available on GitHub. With UnlimCloud, you can log in using your Telegram ID and start storing your files without worrying about storage limits.

[read more]

item.title: PHOENIX MTK [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: PHOENIX MTK [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
PHOENIX MTK
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
# Introducing Phoenix LITE: Your Ultimate Android Optimization Module
Phoenix LITE is here to revolutionize the way you experience your Android device. Developed as a lightweight version of the acclaimed Phoenix Pro, this Magisk module brings a plethora of optimizations and enhancements to your smartphone, ensuring smoother performance and a seamless user experience.

## What is Phoenix LITE?

Phoenix LITE is a Magisk module designed to optimize various aspects of your Android device, catering to different chipsets and hardware configurations. Whether you're using a Qualcomm Snapdragon device or a MediaTek-powered smartphone, Phoenix LITE has you covered.

## Key Features:

### Qualcomm Snapdragon Optimization
- **SDM 8:** Experience enhanced performance and efficiency on devices powered by Qualcomm Snapdragon 8-series chipsets.
- **SDM 7:** Optimize your Snapdragon 7-series device for improved speed and responsiveness.
- **SDM 6:** Even if you're using an older Snapdragon 6-series device, Phoenix LITE ensures that you get the most out of it.

### MediaTek Series Optimization
- **MediaTek Optimization:** For users with devices featuring MediaTek chipsets, Phoenix LITE offers optimizations tailored specifically to enhance performance and stability.

## How to Install Phoenix LITE:

1. Download the Phoenix LITE Magisk module from the provided links:

[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2050006/]MTK Optimization [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2050005/]SDM 8 Optimization [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2050004/]SDM 7 Optimization [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2019745/]SDM 6 Optimization [/url]


2. Install the module using Magisk Manager:
- Open Magisk Manager.
- Go to the Modules section.
- Tap on the "+" icon and select the downloaded Phoenix LITE module.
- Reboot your device to apply the changes.

3. Enjoy optimized performance on your Android device!

## Conclusion:

Phoenix LITE is your go-to solution for optimizing and enhancing the performance of your Android device. With tailored optimizations for Qualcomm Snapdragon and MediaTek chipsets, this Magisk module ensures that you get the best possible experience, regardless of your device's hardware specifications. Say goodbye to lags and slowdowns – install Phoenix LITE today and unleash the full potential of your smartphone!

[read more]

PHOENIX MTK

# Introducing Phoenix LITE: Your Ultimate Android Optimization Module
Phoenix LITE is here to revolutionize the way you experience your Android device. Developed as a lightweight version of the acclaimed Phoenix Pro, this Magisk module brings a plethora of optimizations and enhancements to your smartphone, ensuring smoother performance and a seamless user experience.

Phoenix LITE is a Magisk module designed to optimize various aspects of your Android device, catering to different chipsets and hardware configurations. Whether you're using a Qualcomm Snapdragon device or a MediaTek-powered smartphone, Phoenix LITE has you covered.

item.content:encoded:
PHOENIX MTK
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
# Introducing Phoenix LITE: Your Ultimate Android Optimization Module
Phoenix LITE is here to revolutionize the way you experience your Android device. Developed as a lightweight version of the acclaimed Phoenix Pro, this Magisk module brings a plethora of optimizations and enhancements to your smartphone, ensuring smoother performance and a seamless user experience.

## What is Phoenix LITE?

Phoenix LITE is a Magisk module designed to optimize various aspects of your Android device, catering to different chipsets and hardware configurations. Whether you're using a Qualcomm Snapdragon device or a MediaTek-powered smartphone, Phoenix LITE has you covered.

## Key Features:

### Qualcomm Snapdragon Optimization
- **SDM 8:** Experience enhanced performance and efficiency on devices powered by Qualcomm Snapdragon 8-series chipsets.
- **SDM 7:** Optimize your Snapdragon 7-series device for improved speed and responsiveness.
- **SDM 6:** Even if you're using an older Snapdragon 6-series device, Phoenix LITE ensures that you get the most out of it.

### MediaTek Series Optimization
- **MediaTek Optimization:** For users with devices featuring MediaTek chipsets, Phoenix LITE offers optimizations tailored specifically to enhance performance and stability.

## How to Install Phoenix LITE:

1. Download the Phoenix LITE Magisk module from the provided links:

[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2050006/]MTK Optimization [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2050005/]SDM 8 Optimization [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2050004/]SDM 7 Optimization [/url]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2019745/]SDM 6 Optimization [/url]


2. Install the module using Magisk Manager:
- Open Magisk Manager.
- Go to the Modules section.
- Tap on the "+" icon and select the downloaded Phoenix LITE module.
- Reboot your device to apply the changes.

3. Enjoy optimized performance on your Android device!

## Conclusion:

Phoenix LITE is your go-to solution for optimizing and enhancing the performance of your Android device. With tailored optimizations for Qualcomm Snapdragon and MediaTek chipsets, this Magisk module ensures that you get the best possible experience, regardless of your device's hardware specifications. Say goodbye to lags and slowdowns – install Phoenix LITE today and unleash the full potential of your smartphone!

[read more]

item.title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.


Elevate Your Gaming Experience with Godspeed Controller AIM
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.

Unleash Your Aim with Godspeed Controller AIM
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Dominate the Battlefield
Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

Easy Installation, Instant Results
With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.


Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
1. What games are compatible with Godspeed Controller AIM?
Godspeed Controller AIM is compatible with various joystick-supported Android games, including popular titles like PUBG Mobile, Call of Duty Mobile, Free Fire, and more.

2. Is Godspeed Controller AIM safe to use?
Yes, Godspeed Controller AIM is developed by reputable developers and has been tested extensively to ensure its safety and effectiveness. However, users should always exercise caution when installing third-party modules and follow the installation instructions carefully.

3. Will using Godspeed Controller AIM get me banned in games?
While the module is designed to enhance aiming precision, it does not provide unfair advantages or modify game files, making it unlikely to trigger bans in games. However, it's essential to use any gaming enhancement tool responsibly and within the terms of service of the respective games.

4. How can I install Godspeed Controller AIM?
To install Godspeed Controller AIM, download the Magisk module from the provided source and install it through the Magisk Manager app. Reboot your device after installation to apply the changes.

Revolutionize your gaming experience today with Godspeed Controller AIM. Say goodbye to recoil frustrations and hello to precision aiming like never before. Install the module and take your place among the elite gamers who dominate with ease. It's time to elevate your game and leave your competition in the dust.


[read more]

GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.

The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

Easy Installation, Instant Results

2. Is Godspeed Controller AIM safe to use?
Yes, Godspeed Controller AIM is developed by reputable developers and has been tested extensively to ensure its safety and effectiveness. However, users should always exercise caution when installing third-party modules and follow the installation instructions carefully.

While the module is designed to enhance aiming precision, it does not provide unfair advantages or modify game files, making it unlikely to trigger bans in games. However, it's essential to use any gaming enhancement tool responsibly and within the terms of service of the respective games.

4. How can I install Godspeed Controller AIM?
To install Godspeed Controller AIM, download the Magisk module from the provided source and install it through the Magisk Manager app. Reboot your device after installation to apply the changes.

Revolutionize your gaming experience today with Godspeed Controller AIM. Say goodbye to recoil frustrations and hello to precision aiming like never before. Install the module and take your place among the elite gamers who dominate with ease. It's time to elevate your game and leave your competition in the dust.

item.title: Download Memory Card Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Download Memory Card Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Download Memory Card Repair
(Utilities)
Download Memory Card Repair tool provides facility to recover data and file that erased from hard disk drive due to power failure. www.memorycardrepair.com has capability to download software for retrieve different type deleted file and folder from mobile phone memory card. Advance data recovery program is used to rescue everything that lost from storage device due to virus attack. Memory card recover application enables to restore erased valuable document and some other information from your personal system. Free download file recovery tool has ability to restore deleted data and missing information from XD-Picture memory card. Advance data recovery software provides facility to rescue images and photo that lost from portable storage device due to power failure. Memory card recover application is used to retrieve erased important data and documents from your personal computer system. Download data recovery tool has capability to restore file and folder that missing from memory card due to virus attack. Advance file recovery tool enables to rescue data and information that erased from pc due to some technical problem. Memory card recover tool helps to restore corrupted data and removed detail from XD-Picture memory card. Free download data recovery application provides facility to restore everything that lost from storage device due to format. File recovery software is used to recover missing photo and picture from mobile phone memory card. Advance data recovery tool enables to restore corrupted file and missing important information from portable storage device. Feature:- *Advance data recovery software recover erased music file and lost detail from phone memory card. *Memory card recover program easily rescue deleted photo and picture from portable storage device. *Free download file recovery tool restore missing information and corrupted data from your system. *Download data recovery application retrieve deleted audio/ video songs from system hard disk.

[read more]
item.description:
Download Memory Card Repair
(Utilities)
Download Memory Card Repair tool provides facility to recover data and file that erased from hard disk drive due to power failure. www.memorycardrepair.com has capability to download software for retrieve different type deleted file and folder from mobile phone memory card. [read more]

item.title: Shoviv Office 365 Backup and Restore tool [Email]
item.itunes:title: Shoviv Office 365 Backup and Restore tool [Email]
item.itunes:author: ostconverter
item.itunes:summary:
Shoviv Office 365 Backup and Restore tool
(Email)
Shoviv Office 365 Backup and Restore empowers you to take complete control of your critical Office 365 data, including mailboxes, archive mailboxes, and public folders. This user-friendly tool offers comprehensive backup and restore functionalities, ensuring your valuable data is always protected and accessible.
Key features include:

Backup to Local Storage: Securely store your Office 365 data in PST, MBOX, EML, MSG, MHT, and HTML formats on your local machine.
Flexible Scheduling: Schedule automatic backups at daily, weekly, or monthly intervals for effortless data protection.
Incremental Backups: Only capture new and modified data since the last backup, saving time and storage space.
Granular Restoration: Restore specific emails, folders, or entire mailboxes with ease.
User-Friendly Interface: Navigate the intuitive interface with ease, regardless of your technical expertise.
Shoviv Office 365 Backup and Restore provides peace of mind, knowing your data is safe from accidental deletion, corruption, or security threats. Protect your valuable Office 365 information – try Shoviv today!
[read more]
item.description:
Shoviv Office 365 Backup and Restore tool
(Email)
Shoviv Office 365 Backup and Restore empowers you to take complete control of your critical Office 365 data, including mailboxes, archive mailboxes, and public folders. Shoviv Office 365 Backup and Restore provides peace of mind, knowing your data is safe from accidental deletion, corruption, or security threats. Protect your valuable Office 365 information – try Shoviv today!
[read more]

item.title: Shoviv OST to PST Converter tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Shoviv OST to PST Converter tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ostconverter
item.itunes:summary:
Shoviv OST to PST Converter tool
(Utilities)
Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a comprehensive software solution designed to facilitate seamless conversion of Outlook OST (Offline Storage Table) files to PST (Personal Storage Table) format. This tool is particularly valuable in scenarios where users need to recover data from inaccessible or corrupted OST files, migrate data between Outlook profiles, or switch to a different email client.
Key Features:

Efficient Conversion: Shoviv OST File Converter ensures a quick and efficient conversion process, allowing users to transform OST files into PST format without data loss.

Selective Item Migration: Users can selectively migrate specific items such as emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, and more, giving them flexibility and control over the conversion process.

Preview Functionality: The software provides a preview feature that enables users to preview the contents of OST files before initiating the conversion, ensuring accuracy and eliminating the risk of unwanted data loss.

Batch Conversion: Shoviv's converter supports batch conversion, allowing users to process multiple OST files simultaneously, saving time and streamlining the conversion workflow.

Maintains Data Integrity: The tool preserves the original folder structure and maintains data integrity throughout the conversion process, ensuring that the converted PST files mirror the structure of the original OST files.

User-Friendly Interface: The software is designed with a user-friendly interface, making it accessible for both novice and experienced users.

Compatibility: Shoviv OST File Converter is compatible with various versions of Windows and supports Outlook 2019, 2016, 2013, and earlier versions.

In summary, Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a reliable and feature-rich solution for users seeking a hassle-free and secure way to convert OST files to PST format, providing flexibility, efficiency, and data integrity throughout the process.
[read more]
item.description:
Shoviv OST to PST Converter tool
(Utilities)
Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a comprehensive software solution designed to facilitate seamless conversion of Outlook OST (Offline Storage Table) files to PST (Personal Storage Table) format. This tool is particularly valuable in scenarios where users need to recover data from inaccessible or corrupted OST files, migrate data between Outlook profiles, or switch to a different email client.
Key Features:

Efficient Conversion: Shoviv OST File Converter ensures a quick and efficient conversion process, allowing users to transform OST files into PST format without data loss.

Selective Item Migration: Users can selectively migrate specific items such as emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, and more, giving them flexibility and control over the conversion process.

Preview Functionality: The software provides a preview feature that enables users to preview the contents of OST files before initiating the conversion, ensuring accuracy and eliminating the risk of unwanted data loss.

Batch Conversion: Shoviv's converter supports batch conversion, allowing users to process multiple OST files simultaneously, saving time and streamlining the conversion workflow.

Maintains Data Integrity: The tool preserves the original folder structure and maintains data integrity throughout the conversion process, ensuring that the converted PST files mirror the structure of the original OST files.

User-Friendly Interface: The software is designed with a user-friendly interface, making it accessible for both novice and experienced users.

Compatibility: Shoviv OST File Converter is compatible with various versions of Windows and supports Outlook 2019, 2016, 2013, and earlier versions.

In summary, Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a reliable and feature-rich solution for users seeking a hassle-free and secure way to convert OST files to PST format, providing flexibility, efficiency, and data integrity throughout the process.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Shoviv OST to PST Converter tool
(Utilities)
Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a comprehensive software solution designed to facilitate seamless conversion of Outlook OST (Offline Storage Table) files to PST (Personal Storage Table) format. This tool is particularly valuable in scenarios where users need to recover data from inaccessible or corrupted OST files, migrate data between Outlook profiles, or switch to a different email client.
Key Features:

Efficient Conversion: Shoviv OST File Converter ensures a quick and efficient conversion process, allowing users to transform OST files into PST format without data loss.

Selective Item Migration: Users can selectively migrate specific items such as emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, and more, giving them flexibility and control over the conversion process.

Batch Conversion: Shoviv's converter supports batch conversion, allowing users to process multiple OST files simultaneously, saving time and streamlining the conversion workflow.

Maintains Data Integrity: The tool preserves the original folder structure and maintains data integrity throughout the conversion process, ensuring that the converted PST files mirror the structure of the original OST files.

User-Friendly Interface: The software is designed with a user-friendly interface, making it accessible for both novice and experienced users.

Compatibility: Shoviv OST File Converter is compatible with various versions of Windows and supports Outlook 2019, 2016, 2013, and earlier versions.

In summary, Shoviv OST File Converter for Windows is a reliable and feature-rich solution for users seeking a hassle-free and secure way to convert OST files to PST format, providing flexibility, efficiency, and data integrity throughout the process.

item.title: Memory Card Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Repair
(Utilities)
Comprehensive memory card recovery tool enables professional as well as beginners to repair virus corrupted data files and precious documents from micro secure cards. Innovative Memory Card Repair program provides full data recovery even when system generates any error messages like drive not formatted, drive not detected, unreadable drive and many more. Amazing undelete utility is fully capable to repair memory card data after major data loss situations including software malfunction, accidental file deletion, sudden power glitches, hardware or software failure, formatted drives, data corruption, improper device handling, internet virus etc. Economically feasible card retrieval software helps users to recover text documents, project files, internet files, download zip folders, presentations, favorite wall papers, memorable baby picture clicks and valuable data files. Comprehensive digital card restoration program supports all major file formats of audio video files to immediately repair and restore at user specified memory location. Advance data recovery tool provides option to easily revive and recapture lost data even if memory card is being pulled abruptly form your computer system while accessing. Reliable card revival application allows user to view recovered data files as tree like hierarchical structure before actual restoration. Download Stunning Memory Card Repair Software from our company website www.memorycardrepair.com to repair entire corrupted and damaged memory card data files. Important Features: * Easy to operate memory card recovery tool repairs entire lost damaged data files from major capacity removable memory cards. * Efficient memory card data revival application revives all lost deleted files including mp3, mp4, aiff, asf, jpg, gif, tiff, bmp, doc, html and many more. * Standard multimedia retrieval program provides interactive GUI with inbuilt help manual so does not require any technical skill to restore damaged memory card data.

[read more]

item.title: Mobile Phone Repair Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mobile Phone Repair Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile Phone Repair Tool
(Utilities)
Company introduce with highly configuration and more reliable Mobile Phone Repair Software on website www.memorycardrepair.com that is specialized and professional utility which gives comprehensive recovery of lost files from different types of cell phones in any format like JPG, GIF, PNG, BMP, 3GP, AVI, F4V, M2TS etc. Mobile memory card repair application is more reliable to retrieve formatted mobile data and provide user -friendly interface to easily use without any learning or technical skills. Mobile phone data restoration software recovers data even if your cell phone memory card has been infected with viruses and the file system has been damaged within short time period.

[read more]
